_comment: AI Toolbox MCP Configuration — Copy to your AI client's MCP config
_usage: Each server has a 'description' and 'args'. Install dependencies first (npm/npx).
_compatibility: Works with Claude Code (claude mcp add), Qwen Code, and other MCP-compatible clients.
_security: All packages are pinned to specific versions for reproducible, auditable installs. Update pins after reviewing new releases.

context7.description: Lazy-load up-to-date documentation and API references. Prevents the AI from using outdated knowledge.

sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex debugging and logic problems. Prevents hallucination loops.

filesystem.description: Controlled file system access. Restricts the AI to specific directories to prevent accidental damage.

github.description: Access GitHub repositories — read issues, PRs, and code. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env variable.

memory.description: Long-term memory for the AI. Stores and retrieves context across sessions (local SQLite-based).

fetch.description: Fetch web content into context. Useful for reading documentation URLs the user provides.

full.description: All servers. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN for GitHub integration.
